tuesday.title: Early
tuesday.description: It's Tuesday and a Lunar New Year in SPACE!

tuesday.title: The Morning Show
tuesday.description: No one should negotiate their dreams. Dreams must be free to fly high. No government, no legislature, has a right to limit your dreams. You should never agree to surrender your dreams. -Jesse Jackson

tuesday.title: Wo' Pop
tuesday.description:
"Happy New year. Tonight on Wo'Pop - new music by Imarhan, Ladi6, Juls, Falle Nioke, Kah-Lo and more!

"
With your host Jyoti B.Fly - texts 206-903-5397, email DJ@KEXP.org. IG: @jyotibfly

tuesday.title: Wo' Pop
tuesday.description:
Interview with The Silk Road DJs on their debut EP, a ticket giveaway for Meklit at The Triple Door on Feb 28th, Stavroz, live in studio session.
With your host Jyoti B.Fly - texts 206-903-5397, email DJ@KEXP.org. IG: @jyotibfly

I lie here in a riot of sunlight
watching the day break and the clouds flying.
Everything is going to be all right.

thursday.description: “It takes strength to face our sadness and to grieve and to let our grief and our anger flow in tears when they need to. It takes strength to talk about our feelings and to reach out for help and comfort when we need it.” -Mr Rogers

saturday.title: Bergsonist w/ Sam Clarke
saturday.description:
Bergsonist is a musician originally from Morocco based in NYC. Genre-free sonic explorations with occasional conversations/guest mixes featuring inspiring artists.
From the host: I wanted to thank Sam for his mix, you can find Sam Clarke's IG: https://www.instagram.com/3sam3clarke3/
and his label Rank + File bandcamp (featuring a beautiful release by Gaul Plus (tip+++)): https://rankandfile.bandcamp.com/music
Thank you for tuning in!
